# webArchive

**Instance Property**

A web archive representing the data source, its subresources, and subframes.

## Declaration

```swift
var webArchive: WebArchive! { get }
```

## Discussion

In the case of HTML, if the current content is preferred, then send [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebDataSource/webArchive] to the appropriate DOM object.

## Related Documentation

- **mainResource**: A`WebResource` object representing the data source.
